title: A Feast On The Train In HIndi| Ch 11 | Roots and Wings Class 6 | Difficult words in the description
description:
This is the Hindi explanation of the story A Feast On The Train from Roots and Wings Literature Reader Class 6th.

Difficult Words
1. Unfair - Biased / अनुचित
2. Complained - express dissatisfaction / शिकायत की
3. Refuse - Decline / अस्वीकृत
4. Taught - Educate / शिक्षित
5. Expecting - regard (something) as likely to happen / उम्मीद
6. Witty - Clever 
7. Fellow - Boy
8. Reciting - say aloud / सुनाना
9. Boarded - get on or into / सवार
10. Wrapped - cover or enclose in paper or soft material / लपेटा हुआ
11. Sealed - fasten or close securely / मोहरबंद
12. Rags - a piece of old cloth 
13. Bother - trouble / परेशान होना
14. Spread - open out (something) so as to extend its surface area / बिछाना 
15. Enquired - ask for information from someone / पूछताछ
16. Chorused - say the same thing at the same time / रंजित
17. Chant - a repeated rhythmic phrase / गाना
18. Halted - Stopped / रुका
19. Returned - go back to / लौटा हुआ
20. Carriage - any of the separate sections of a train that carry passengers / ले जाना
21. Ripe - (of fruit or grain) developed to the point of readiness for harvesting and eating / पका हुआ
22. Remarked - say something as a comment / टिप्पणी की
23. Devour - eat (food or prey) hungrily or quickly / लालच से खाना
24. Heartily - to a great degree / दिल से
25. Disheartened - having lost determination or confidence / निस्र्त्साहित
26. Teasing - intended to provoke or make fun of someone in a playful way / छेड़ छाड़
27. Accompanied - go somewhere with (someone) as a companion / के साथ
28. Glee - great delight / उल्लास
29. Arrived - reach a place at the end of a journey / पहुंच गए
30. Bowed - bend the head or upper part of the body as a sign of respect, greeting / झुके
